iteration_2.note: Optimized skill: added basename guidance, __main__ guard emphasis, JSON output rules, streamlined examples

changes_made: Streamlined skill from 236 lines to ~100 lines, removing redundant sections
Added CRITICAL guidance to use os.path.basename() for dict keys in file processing
Made __name__ == '__main__' guard more prominent with macOS explanation
Added concrete checksum and wordcount patterns matching both task types
Added JSON output rules section (sort_keys, indent, verify output)
Consolidated tips into Key Rules section
Removed verbose error handling and performance tuning sections

max_achievable_scores.note: parallel-checksum max is 93/100 due to test bug: bun toHaveProperty('data_00.bin') interprets dots as nested path separators, causing 'all 30 expected filenames are present in output' test to always fail regardless of generated code
